description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and backport branches, on tags matching v*, on pull requests to master and backport branches, and daily at 6AM UTC. The workflow has four jobs: lint, test, check, and deploy. The lint job checks code style with Python 3.9, the test job runs unit tests on multiple Python versions and operating systems, the check job ensures previous jobs succeeded, and the deploy job builds and releases the package to PyPI on tag pushes.
